summary: Eval harness uses matrix testing: 22 scenarios × 7 scorers = 154 dynamic vitest tests
context: Phase 16 built the deterministic eval harness core for v1.4 Agent Behavior Quality milestone. Needed an architecture that scales to new scenarios and scorers without code changes.
rationale: Matrix approach (each scenario tested against every scorer) maximizes coverage and catches cross-category regressions. YAML scenarios are data-driven so adding new cases requires no code. Separate vitest config isolates eval runs from the main 700-test suite.

alternatives.option: Single test per scenario with all scorers bundled
alternatives.reason_rejected: Harder to debug which scorer failed; no per-scorer granularity in CI output

alternatives.option: Jest instead of vitest for eval runner
alternatives.reason_rejected: Project already uses vitest; consistency matters more than marginal eval-specific features
